title: K-200 Nav/GNC Subsystem Specification
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Subsystem Specification

Document number: MD-DOC-408-A. Revision: A. Type: specification. Author: Dev Patel. Created: 2024-09-17. Last modified: 2025-08-07. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1115, P-1096.
